name: Sweet Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl and blend well.
2. Place the mixture in a foil packet or 1-pint glass jar and label as Sweet Salad Dressing Mix.
3. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months. Makes about half cup of mix.
4. Sweet Salad Dressing: Combine the mix with 3/4 cup vegetable oil and 1/4 cup vinegar in a glass jar.
5. Stir until well blended; chill. Makes about 1 1/4 cups of dressing.
